title: 4DX “The Odyssey” Special Screening

title_lang.zh_hk: 4DX《奧德賽》遮風擋雨 特典場

synopsis:
After the Trojan War, Odysseus faces a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way.
Written and directed by Christopher Nolan, The Odyssey is an epic fantasy adventure shot entirely with IMAX film cameras. The film stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, Tom Holland as Telemachus, Anne Hathaway as Penelope, Robert Pattinson as Antinous and Zendaya as Athena.

synopsis_lang.en:
After the Trojan War, Odysseus faces a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way.
Written and directed by Christopher Nolan, The Odyssey is an epic fantasy adventure shot entirely with IMAX film cameras. The film stars Matt Damon as Odysseus, Tom Holland as Telemachus, Anne Hathaway as Penelope, Robert Pattinson as Antinous and Zendaya as Athena.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 環球影業榮譽呈獻全球矚目鉅製《奧德賽》（The Odyssey），是奧斯卡最佳導演基斯杜化路蘭繼《奧本海默》後的最新力作。全片採用IMAX技術拍攝，將荷馬筆下不朽動作史詩經典神話，搬上大銀幕。奧德修斯在特洛伊戰爭後，展開驚心動魄的返鄉征途，歷盡無窮無盡考驗，最終與摯愛重逢。《奧德賽》雲集超華麗卡士，包括麥迪文、湯姆賀倫、安妮夏菲慧、羅拔柏迪臣、雷碧達尼安高、辛蒂雅及查理絲花朗等。

cast: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong'o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron

cast_lang.en: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong'o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
cast_lang.zh_hk: 麥迪文、湯姆賀倫、安妮夏菲慧、羅拔柏迪臣、雷碧達尼安高、辛蒂雅、查理絲花朗

subtitle: Chinese
